findings.review_note: Long assertions should be checked against source support before use.
findings.text: I am writing about my assignment at Riverbend Components LLC. I raised concerns about post-shift inventory work and whether that time should be recorded. After that, I received a warning and my assignment ended.

findings.review_note: Human/legal review required before relying on or sending this assertion.
findings.text: The company clearly violated the law by firing me for asking about wages.
